name: Crockpot Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sauce, hamburger, shells, and mushrooms together.
2. Pour half of this mixture into the crockpot.
3. Add sour cream and sliced provolone on top of the meat mixture.
4. Sprinkle sliced mozzarella over the sour cream and provolone.
5. Pour the remaining sauce mixture back into the crockpot.
6. Cook on low for 6-7 hours.
